mutations.name: addDiscussionComment
mutations.description: Adds a comment to a Discussion, possibly as a reply to another comment.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: comment
returnFields.description: The newly created discussion comment.

mutations.name: addDiscussionPollVote
mutations.description: Vote for an option in a discussion poll.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: pollOption
returnFields.description: The poll option that a vote was added to.

mutations.name: addUpvote
mutations.description: Add an upvote to a discussion or discussion comment.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: subject
returnFields.description: The votable subject.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: discussion
returnFields.description: The discussion that was closed.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: discussion
returnFields.description: The discussion that was just created.

mutations.name: deleteDiscussion
mutations.description: Delete a discussion and all of its replies.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: discussion
returnFields.description: The discussion that was just deleted.

mutations.name: deleteDiscussionComment
mutations.description: Delete a discussion comment. If it has replies, wipe it instead.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: comment
returnFields.description: The discussion comment that was just deleted.

mutations.name: markDiscussionCommentAsAnswer
mutations.description: Mark a discussion comment as the chosen answer for discussions in an answerable category.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: discussion
returnFields.description: The discussion that includes the chosen comment.

mutations.name: removeUpvote
mutations.description: Remove an upvote to a discussion or discussion comment.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: subject
returnFields.description: The votable subject.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: discussion
returnFields.description: The discussion that was reopened.

mutations.name: unmarkDiscussionCommentAsAnswer
mutations.description: Unmark a discussion comment as the chosen answer for discussions in an answerable category.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: discussion
returnFields.description: The discussion that includes the comment.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: discussion
returnFields.description: The modified discussion.

mutations.name: updateDiscussionComment
mutations.description: Update the contents of a comment on a Discussion.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: comment
returnFields.description: The modified discussion comment.

fields.name: activeLockReason
fields.description: Reason that the conversation was locked.

fields.name: answer
fields.description: The comment chosen as this discussion's answer, if any.

fields.name: answerChosenAt
fields.description: The time when a user chose this discussion's answer, if answered.

fields.name: answerChosenBy
fields.description: The user who chose this discussion's answer, if answered.

fields.name: author
fields.description: The actor who authored the discussion.

fields.name: authorAssociation
fields.description: Author's association with the subject of the comment.

fields.name: body
fields.description: The main text of the discussion post.

fields.name: bodyHTML
fields.description: The body rendered to HTML.

fields.name: bodyText
fields.description: The body rendered to text.

fields.name: category
fields.description: The category for this discussion.

fields.name: closed
fields.description: Indicates if the object is closed (definition of closed may depend on type).

fields.name: closedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was closed.

fields.name: comments
fields.description: The replies to the discussion.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: createdViaEmail
fields.description: Check if this comment was created via an email reply.

fields.name: databaseId
fields.description: Identifies the primary key from the database.

fields.name: editor
fields.description: The actor who edited the comment.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the Discussion object.

fields.name: includesCreatedEdit
fields.description: Check if this comment was edited and includes an edit with the creation data.

fields.name: isAnswered
fields.description: Only return answered/unanswered discussions.

fields.name: labels
fields.description: A list of labels associated with the object.

interfaces.name: RepositoryDiscussionAuthor
interfaces.description: Represents an author of discussions in repositories.

fields.name: repositoryDiscussions
fields.description: Discussions this user has started.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: answered
arguments.description: Filter discussions to only those that have been answered or not. Defaults to including both answered and unanswered discussions.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

arguments.name: orderBy
arguments.description: Ordering options for discussions returned from the connection.

arguments.name: repositoryId
arguments.description: Filter discussions to only those in a specific repository.

arguments.name: states
arguments.description: A list of states to filter the discussions by.

arguments.description: Filter discussion comments to only those that were marked as the answer.

arguments.name: repositoryId
arguments.description: Filter discussion comments to only those in a specific repository.
